name: Washington State Bank
description_short: Washington State Bank is a community bank headquartered in Washington, IL, offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, online banking, and merchant services.
description_long:
Washington State Bank is a traditional community bank located in Washington, Illinois, serving the local area with full-service banking solutions. The bank operates from its main office at 1110 Peoria Street with extended lobby and drive-thru hours to accommodate both personal and business customers. Founded to serve the Washington, IL community, the bank maintains a local presence with personal relationship banking as a core principle.

The bank offers a range of personal and business banking products. For individuals, they provide checking and savings accounts with online banking access and a mobile app. Business customers have access to specialized checking accounts (Business Checking and Economy Business Checking) with tiered fee structures based on transaction volume, online bill pay services, and Autobooks invoicing and payment processing capabilities. The bank also provides loan services and debit card management with after-hours fraud reporting.

Washington State Bank distinguishes itself through personalized service with one-on-one appointments available during business hours and direct phone support at (309) 444-2265. The Economy Business Checking account is notable for allowing businesses with minimal transaction needs to avoid monthly service charges with a $400 minimum balance. Autobooks integration enables small business owners to create branded invoices and accept electronic payments directly through their online banking portal.

As a small community bank, Washington State Bank is best suited for customers prioritizing local relationship banking and personalized service over digital-first experiences. The limited public information about rates, account features, and product specifics suggests a traditional banking model. Customers seeking comprehensive financial product information or comparing rates across institutions may find the website lacking in detail. The bank's strength lies in serving established local customers rather than attracting customers seeking modern fintech features or competitive rate shopping. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business Checking accounts with tiered fee structures
Economy Business Checking with minimal transaction volumes
Online Banking platform with free access
WSB Mobile App for account access
Loan products and loan payment processing
Debit card services with after-hours fraud reporting
Electronic fund transfers and ACH transactions
pros: Free online banking and mobile app access for account management
Economy Business Checking with no monthly service charge for businesses maintaining $400+ minimum balance
Autobooks invoicing integration allows businesses to send branded invoices and accept online payments directly from their account
After-hours fraud reporting available at (844) 202-5333 for lost or stolen debit cards
One-on-one appointments available during business hours for personalized service
Competitive activity-based pricing on Business Checking with earnings credit options to offset fees
Extended drive-thru hours (8am-5pm weekdays) for customer convenience
cons: Website lacks transparency on savings account rates, CD rates, loan rates, and APY information
Business Checking carries $7.50 monthly maintenance fee with per-transaction costs ($0.12 per check paid, $0.20 per deposit)
Online Bill Pay requires $2.95/month subscription after 30-day trial with additional per-payment charges ($0.55 each after 10 payments)
Limited digital service offerings compared to national banks; appears to be a traditional banking model without fintech features
Autobooks may require additional monthly fees for the accounting package upgrade, with no pricing details provided
best_for: Small business owners in Washington, IL seeking local relationship banking with invoice and payment processing tools
Businesses with minimal monthly transaction volume that can maintain $400+ minimum balance to avoid monthly fees
Local customers who value in-person appointments and personalized banking service over digital-only experiences
Agricultural or small commercial enterprises in Central Illinois seeking community bank lending relationships
diagnosis: Washington State Bank is best for small business owners and individuals in the Washington, IL area who prefer relationship-based community banking with personalized service over digital convenience. The main caveat is the lack of publicly available pricing information (rates, APYs, loan terms) on their website, making rate comparison difficult; customers should call (309) 444-2265 directly for specific product details and pricing.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
